description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to any branch and on pull requests to the master branch. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test with multiple Python versions on ubuntu-24.04, setting up a test environment with Redis, Memcached, MySQL, and PostgreSQL services. It checks out the repository, installs OS packages and Python dependencies, logs versions, prepares databases, runs tests and linters via Tox, and processes code coverage.
